arts.ttl: Liverpool and Newcastle United ‘betting heavily’ on same player – €20-25m for January deal
arts.sum: Over the past few months, the Spanish media have regularly named Liverpool as one of Loïc Badé’s contenders. The Premier League side aren’t alone as Newcastle United are also in the picture to sign the Sevilla player in the winter market. arts.ttl: Saturday's FA Cup preview: Liverpool, Man City and Chelsea in action
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank hopes to soon see the best of Rico Henry again as the defender prepares to make his long-awaited return from injury in Saturday's FA Cup third round tie against Plymouth . "Rico will be involved in the game tomorrow - not only will he be involved, he will start," Frank told a press conference.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Accrington – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome League Two outfit Accrington Stanley to Anfield on Saturday lunchtime for the third round of the FA Cup. Premier League leaders Liverpool lost away from home for the first time this season during the week. arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool player loved by Steven Gerrard now hoping to cause massive FA Cup upset
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Accrington Stanley midfielder Liam Coyle is heading back to familiar territory this weekend at Anfield as the League Two side face Liverpool in the FA Cup
